questions: What evidence signals already exist per sealed session, and how do they join?
What is the smallest executable artifact-freeze rule?

findings.claim: Eight signals joinable from session_id/phase: ledger entry, gate artifacts, sidecars, audit_history, intent-lock, shadow events, changelog, seal commit/tag

do_ai_provenance walks a session per phase; status_json defines the final-line JSON contract; the bundle generalizes both with an explicit completeness field (partial reconstruction surfaced, never fabricated)
SCHEMA_REGISTRY.json baseline + gate_schema_freeze_lint (directory vs registry; unregistered schema without plan-declared justification -> WARN), sg_closure_lint-shaped, audit Step 0.6 ladder
